pinyinNumbered: yi1 ping2 zi5 bu4 xiang3 , ban4 ping2 zi5 huang4 dang5
definitions: lit. a full bottle makes no sound; a half-filled bottle sloshes (idiom)
fig. empty vessels make the most noise
all one's life; throughout one's life
a whole lifetime (idiom); all my life
1st rank or top three candidates who passed the imperial examination (i.e. 狀元|状元[zhuang4 yuan2], 榜眼[bang3 yan3], and 探花[tan4 hua1], respectively)
(idiom) a son or daughter; a child
a piece of land of 1.3 mu 畝|亩[mu3]
to fall gravely ill, never to recover (idiom)

pinyin: yi fa bu ke shou shi
pinyinNumbered: yi1 fa1 bu4 ke3 shou1 shi5
definitions: once it gets started there's no stopping it

pinyin: yi fa er bu ke shou
pinyinNumbered: yi1 fa1 er2 bu4 ke3 shou1
definitions: to be impossible to stop once started
lit. like a sheet of loose sand
continuously; always; all the way through
as far as the eye can see
to see through something at first glance (idiom)
to hit the target with a single shot
(idiom) to have a superficial knowledge of a subject; to know a smattering of sth
